docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOPHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CULLEN, RONALD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT *** INVALIDATED DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF FEES BY DEFENDANT RONALD CULLENS *** FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOPHN STEWART COMPANY

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CULLEN, RONALD HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT CULLEN, RONALD

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-20-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RONALD CULLEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID BY DEFENDANT RONALD CULLEN. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED ON 5/22/12 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
